summary: Verified new feature: denormalized 'employee_department_name' on activities (POST create + startup backfill + PUT department rename cascade) and PDF report header change from 'القسم' → 'القسم الذي قام بالنشاط'. Backend: 49/49 pytest tests pass (44 regression + 5 new TestEmployeeDepartmentName tests covering create-populates, list-returns-field, backfill-migration-populated-existing, department-rename-updates-both-target-and-employee-dept-names, gm-has-null-employee-department-name). Frontend (Expo web, 390x844): admin login OK; Activities screen renders both 'القسم المنفّذ' and 'القسم المستهدف' rows on each employee-created card, and correctly omits 'القسم المنفّذ' for GM-created activities (admin has no department — expected). Reports screen 'تصدير PDF' produces HTML whose weekly table header now reads 'القسم الذي قام بالنشاط' and body cells contain the denormalized department name. No red screen. Only pre-existing shadow* deprecation warnings.

react_native_issues.issue: react-native-web deprecation warning: shadow* props should migrate to boxShadow. Non-blocking, carried over from prior iterations.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate remaining shadow* → boxShadow to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py create_activity correctly resolves employee_department_name via user.department_id lookup (line 397-402). GM (no department) results in null which is intentional and displayed correctly on the UI (line 129 activities.tsx uses !!item.employee_department_name).
server.py update_department cascades name change to BOTH target_department_name and employee_department_name (lines 231-238). Verified via backend test.
server.py seed_initial_data backfill migration (lines 159-170) runs on every startup and only touches activities missing the field — idempotent and safe.

reportExport.ts weekly/monthly table uses employee_department_name (line 83) with new column header 'القسم الذي قام بالنشاط' (line 100). By-department report still uses 'القسم' which is correct since that report groups by department, not by activity.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_* activities, departments, divisions and users during the run (small volume, prefixed for identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend now denormalizes employee_department_name on activity documents. Testable via: POST /api/activities as any user with department_id → returned doc has 'employee_department_name'. PUT /api/departments/{id} cascades name to both target_department_name AND employee_department_name in activities. Startup backfill fills the field for pre-existing activities. Frontend Activities cards (activities.tsx) show 'القسم المنفّذ: X' when employee_department_name is present. PDF weekly/monthly report column header is 'القسم الذي قام بالنشاط' (reportExport.ts line 100).
